mechanics.excerpt: If you re having trouble with details try basing the character one from favorite book or movie_ But don't sweat it too much; roleplaying the character iS bound t0 draw out parts of the character' per- sona that yoU wouldn' have thought up otherwise SAMPLE CHARACTERS Following this section are eight sample characters New players can use them to start playing right away; without going through the character creation process Players can also base their own characters the samples; customizing them exchanging some of the listed skills and traits for ones of equal value (with the Bamemaster' $ permission).
